model_specification_line: smf.wls('full_time ~ daca_eligible * post + C(year) + C(statefip) + age + age_sq', data=df, weights=df['perwt']).fit(cov_type='HC1')
sample_selection: bpld == 20000 (born in Mexico, detailed birthplace code)
yrimmig > 0 and yrimmig <= 2007 (immigrated by 2007, continuous US residence since then)
birth_year (year - age) in [1977, 1986] (bandwidth around DACA age cutoff)
survey year in {2009, 2010, 2011, 2013, 2014, 2015, 2016} (pre/post periods; 2012 excluded as transition year)
